action_steps.title: Extract parseBaseExploreRequest() helper in ExplorationHandlers.java to eliminate preamble repetition across all four handler methods
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/ExplorationHandlers.java, extract a private record BaseExploreRequest(RelationConfig config, ExploreParams params) and a method parseCommonExploreRequest(HttpExchange exchange) that runs: getQuery(), parseQueryParams(), requireParam(), resolveRelationConfig(), resolveExploreParams(), returns null on any failure. Replace duplicate preamble in handleSemanticFieldExplore (lines 48-63), handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti (lines 94-113), handleSemanticFieldComparison (lines 145-156), handleSemanticFieldExamples (lines 201-218).

action_steps.title: Refactor ExploreOptions to remove inapplicable nounsPerSeed field for multi-seed mode
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/model/ExploreOptions.java line 12, change 'int nounsPerSeed' to 'java.util.Optional<Integer> nounsPerSeed' to make multi-seed inapplicability explicit. Update the single call site at src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/ExplorationHandlers.java line 66-67 to pass Optional.of(nounsPerSeed), and usages in SemanticFieldExplorer.java to call nounsPerSeed().orElse(defaultValue).

action_steps.title: Run full test suite after SketchHandlers and ExplorationHandlers refactoring to confirm no regression
action_steps.detail: After completing steps 1-3, run 'mvn test' in /mnt/d/git/word-sketch-lucene to confirm no regressions in src/test/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/HandlersTest.java and src/test/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/SemanticFieldExplorerTest.java. These are pure structural refactors with no behavior change; all existing tests must still pass.

test-gaps.name: test-gaps
test-gaps.description: Add missing test coverage for two critical untested classes: write ConlluConverterTest covering MWT-skipping, chunk rotation, and sentence-boundary logic; write BlackLabConllUIndexerTest covering error-continuation callback and close-ordering

action_steps.title: Write ConlluConverterTest covering MWT-skipping, chunk rotation, and sentence-boundary logic
action_steps.detail: Write unit tests for src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/indexer/blacklab/ConlluConverter.java. Create a new test class in src/test/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/indexer/blacklab/ (mirroring the test package structure). Use in-memory CoNLL-U strings written to temp files via Files.createTempFile. Test: (1) basic sentence converts to correct token count; (2) MWT tokens (ID with '-') are skipped; (3) sentence boundaries increment counter; (4) empty input returns zeros; (5) only-MWT input returns 0 valid tokens.

action_steps.title: Write BlackLabConllUIndexerTest covering error-continuation callback and close-ordering
action_steps.detail: Write unit tests for src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/indexer/blacklab/BlackLabConllUIndexer.java. Create a new test class in src/test/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/indexer/blacklab/ following the setup pattern in src/test/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/BlackLabDummyTest.java. Test: (1) indexPath() on a valid CoNLL-U temp file succeeds with non-zero doc/token counts; (2) malformed sentence triggers error callback and indexing continues.

model-reorg.name: model-reorg
model-reorg.description: Reorganize package boundaries: move RelationType/PosGroup from config/ to model/ (domain vocabulary), stage model/ split moving ExploreOptions to exploration/ and Edge/RelationEdgeType to exploration/, extract GrammarConfig value object from GrammarConfigLoader, and move LongIntHashMap to a collections/ package

action_steps.title: Move RelationType and PosGroup from config/ to model/ package and update all import sites
action_steps.detail: Move src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/config/RelationType.java and config/PosGroup.java to src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/model/. Update package declaration in both files to 'package pl.marcinmilkowski.word_sketch.model'. Update imports in: api/SketchHandlers.java (config.RelationType → model.RelationType), exploration/SemanticFieldExplorer.java (config.PosGroup → model.PosGroup), config/RelationConfig.java (both). Also update test file src/test/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/SemanticFieldExplorerTest.java lines 312 and 334 which use hardcoded 'pl.marcinmilkowski.word_sketch.config.RelationType.SURFACE' — change to 'pl.marcinmilkowski.word_sketch.model.RelationType.SURFACE'. Run 'mvn compile' to verify.

action_steps.title: Stage model/ split: move ExploreOptions to exploration/, move Edge and RelationEdgeType to exploration/
action_steps.detail: Move src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/model/ExploreOptions.java, model/Edge.java, and model/RelationEdgeType.java to src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/exploration/. Update package declarations. Run 'grep -rn "import.*model.Edge\|import.*model.RelationEdgeType\|import.*model.ExploreOptions" src/' to find all callers and update their imports — including src/test/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/query/SemanticFieldExplorerTest.java which imports model.Edge and model.ExploreOptions. Verify with 'mvn compile'.

action_steps.title: Extract GrammarConfig immutable value object from GrammarConfigLoader
action_steps.detail: In src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/config/GrammarConfigLoader.java lines 285-314, extract getRelations(), getRelation(), and toJson() state into a new GrammarConfig record. Let fromReader() and fromFile() factory methods return GrammarConfig. Update all injection sites: api/WordSketchApiServer.java, api/SketchHandlers.java, api/ExplorationHandlers.java, Main.java — all hold GrammarConfigLoader references that become GrammarConfig.

action_steps.title: Move LongIntHashMap from utils/ to a new collections/ package
action_steps.detail: Create directory src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/collections/. Move src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/utils/LongIntHashMap.java to the new collections/ package. Update package declaration in LongIntHashMap.java. Update import in src/test/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/utils/LongIntHashMapTest.java. Run 'grep -rn import.*utils.LongIntHashMap src/' to confirm no other consumers need updating.

error-handling-unification.name: error-handling-unification
error-handling-unification.description: Unify HTTP error handling: wrapHandler sends 500 for IAE, parseQueryParams silently swallows URL decode failures, resolveExploreParams leaks internal Java messages

action_steps.title: Update wrapHandler to catch IllegalArgumentException and send 400 instead of 500
action_steps.detail: In WordSketchApiServer.wrapHandler, add catch(IllegalArgumentException e) above the generic Exception catch. Send HTTP 400: HttpApiUtils.sendError(exchange, 400, description + ' bad request: ' + e.getMessage())

action_steps.title: Fix parseQueryParams to propagate URLDecoder failures as IllegalArgumentException with clear message
action_steps.detail: In HttpApiUtils.parseQueryParams, replace the silent catch around URLDecoder.decode with a throw new IllegalArgumentException('Invalid URL encoding in parameter: ' + key, e). The caller (wrapHandler after step 1 fix) will send 400.

action_steps.title: Fix resolveExploreParams to send a fixed user-friendly message instead of NumberFormatException.getMessage()
action_steps.detail: In ExplorationHandlers.resolveExploreParams, the NumberFormatException catch currently sends e.getMessage() to client. Replace with a static message: HttpApiUtils.sendError(exchange, 400, 'Invalid numeric parameter: expected integer'). Remove any reference to the exception message in the HTTP response.

null-seed-contract.name: null-seed-contract
null-seed-contract.description: Fix ExplorationResult.empty() contract: @param says seed must not be null but its only call site in SemanticFieldExplorer passes null when seed is absent

action_steps.title: Change ExplorationResult.empty(String seed) @param to allow null, or add a no-arg empty() overload
action_steps.detail: ExplorationResult.empty(String seed): change @param Javadoc from 'must not be null' to '@param seed the seed word; may be null if no seed was resolved'. Optionally guard in body: if seed == null, use empty string or a sentinel.

action_steps.title: Update SemanticFieldExplorer to not pass null to empty() (use empty overload or guard before call)
action_steps.detail: SemanticFieldExplorer.exploreByPattern line 155: change the null path from 'return ExplorationResult.empty(seed)' (passes null) to 'return ExplorationResult.empty("")' or add a dedicated ExplorationResult.empty() no-arg factory that uses empty string as seed.

action_steps.title: Verify getSeed() return contract is consistent with the null case
action_steps.detail: After fix, verify getSeed() return contract is consistent: if empty string is used for null-seed case, ensure callers handling result.getSeed() do not break. Check ExplorationHandlers.handleSemanticFieldExplore which puts result.getSeed() into response.

api-param-normalization.name: api-param-normalization
api-param-normalization.description: Normalize API surface: handleSemanticFieldExamples uses 'max' while siblings use 'top'; executeCollocateSearch has reversed param order; optional posMap placed mid-list; boolean trap withStoredHits

action_steps.title: Rename 'max' to 'top' in handleSemanticFieldExamples (one-line change)
action_steps.detail: ExplorationHandlers.handleSemanticFieldExamples line 222: change params.getOrDefault('max', '10') to params.getOrDefault('top', '10'). Update method Javadoc comment on line 210 from max=10 to top=10. This is a client-facing API fix.

action_steps.title: Swap executeCollocateSearch params to (lemma, bcqlPattern, ...) and update all call sites
action_steps.detail: CollocateQueryHelper.executeCollocateSearch: swap parameter order from (String bcqlPattern, String lemma, boolean withStoredHits) to (String lemma, String bcqlPattern, boolean withStoredHits). Update all call sites in the class and any callers.

action_steps.title: Move @Nullable posMap parameter to end of buildAndRankCollocates signature
action_steps.detail: CollocateQueryHelper.buildAndRankCollocates: move the @Nullable posMap parameter from its current mid-list position to the last position, after all required parameters. Update callers accordingly.

action_steps.title: Replace withStoredHits boolean trap with named constant or two-method overloads
action_steps.detail: CollocateQueryHelper.executeCollocateSearch withStoredHits boolean: introduce a package-private enum StoredHitsMode { WITH_HITS, WITHOUT_HITS } or create two overloads. Replace the boolean parameter with the enum to self-document call sites.

hot-path-performance.name: hot-path-performance
hot-path-performance.description: Fix CollocateQueryHelper.scoreHits hot-path issues: debug log fires per hit, and getTotalFrequency is called once per hit for the same collocate

action_steps.title: Remove or downgrade per-hit logger.debug to TRACE in scoreHits (no-frequency collocate case)
action_steps.detail: CollocateQueryHelper.scoreHits line 261: remove logger.debug('No joint frequency found for collocate ...'). This fires once per hit in a corpus query hot path. The no-frequency case is normal data, not a debug event worth logging at debug level.

action_steps.title: Pre-compute collocate frequency map before scoreHits loop: deduplicate collocate lemmas, batch-fetch frequencies, reuse in loop
action_steps.detail: CollocateQueryHelper.scoreHits: before the loop, build Map<String,Long> freqCache by collecting distinct collocate lemmas from records, then calling getTotalFrequency once per distinct lemma. Inside the loop replace getTotalFrequency(collocateLemma) with freqCache.getOrDefault(collocateLemma, 0L). This reduces N duplicate I/O calls to at most distinct-collocate calls.

package-layer-realignment.name: package-layer-realignment
package-layer-realignment.description: Move Edge.java and RelationEdgeType.java from exploration/ to model/: these are API/presentation types consumed only by api/, not by any exploration computation

action_steps.title: Move Edge.java from exploration/ to model/
action_steps.detail: Move src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/exploration/Edge.java: (1) git mv the file to the model/ package directory, (2) change the package declaration from exploration to model, (3) update all import statements in api/ that reference it. Edge is a DTO containing source, target, type — pure data, used only in api/ response building.

action_steps.title: Move RelationEdgeType.java from exploration/ to model/
action_steps.detail: Move src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/exploration/RelationEdgeType.java: (1) git mv the file to the model/ package directory, (2) change package declaration to model, (3) update all import statements in api/ that reference it. RelationEdgeType is a presentation enum (SHARED, SPECIFIC, etc.) with no semantic role in exploration computation. Sibling enums RelationType and PosGroup are already in model/.

action_steps.title: Update all import statements in api/ and exploration/ packages
action_steps.detail: Update import statements: in src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/ExploreResponseBuilder.java and src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/ExplorationHandlers.java, change imports of Edge and RelationEdgeType from exploration to model package. Verify no other files import from the old exploration/ locations.

action_steps.title: Verify compilation and tests pass
action_steps.detail: Run mvn compile and mvn test to verify zero broken imports and all tests pass after the move.

handler-validation-pipeline.name: handler-validation-pipeline
handler-validation-pipeline.description: Extract shared validation preamble repeated in 3/4 ExplorationHandlers, and split handleBcqlQueryPost 50-line multi-concern method

action_steps.title: Extract params+relation+seed validation into validateAndParseExploreRequest() helper in ExplorationHandlers
action_steps.detail: ExplorationHandlers: extract private record ExploreRequestContext(Map<String,String> params, RelationConfig relation, String seed). Add private @Nullable ExploreRequestContext validateAndParseExploreRequest(HttpExchange exchange) that runs the 3-step preamble (parse params, resolve relation config, require seed). Returns null if any step fails (error already sent). Replace the preamble in handleSemanticFieldExplore, handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti, handleSemanticFieldComparison.

action_steps.title: Refactor handleBcqlQueryPost: extract JSON body parsing to helper, extract validation to helper
action_steps.detail: SketchHandlers.handleBcqlQueryPost: extract private BcqlRequest parseBcqlRequest(HttpExchange exchange) that handles JSON body parsing and validation (returns null + sends error on failure). Extract private void executeBcqlAndRespond(BcqlRequest request, HttpExchange exchange) that handles query execution and response formatting. Reduces the 50-line method to a 10-line coordinator.

naming-cleanup.name: naming-cleanup
naming-cleanup.description: Fix misleading method names: getFullPattern() constructs a string (should be buildFullPattern), iterateRelations executes queries (should be executeRelationQueries)

action_steps.title: Rename RelationConfig.getFullPattern() to buildFullPattern() and update all call sites
action_steps.detail: Rename RelationConfig.getFullPattern(String lemma) to buildFullPattern(String lemma). Update call sites: SemanticFieldExplorer.java (multiple calls), ExplorationHandlers.java, SketchHandlers.java. Verify no reflection or string-based lookups for the old name.

action_steps.title: Rename SketchHandlers.iterateRelations() to executeRelationQueries() or queryAllRelations() and update call sites
action_steps.detail: Rename SketchHandlers.iterateRelations to executeRelationQueries or queryAndCollectRelations. The method executes queries and accumulates results, not a passive iterator. Update the one call site in SketchHandlers.

visibility-consistency.name: visibility-consistency
visibility-consistency.description: Make ExploreResponseBuilder package-private to match all sibling api/ classes (SketchHandlers, ExplorationHandlers, HttpApiUtils are all package-private)

action_steps.title: Remove 'public' modifier from ExploreResponseBuilder class declaration
action_steps.detail: In ExploreResponseBuilder.java: change 'public final class ExploreResponseBuilder' to 'final class ExploreResponseBuilder'. The class is only used within the api/ package.

action_steps.title: Verify no external package imports ExploreResponseBuilder
action_steps.detail: Verify with grep that no class outside the api/ package imports ExploreResponseBuilder. If found, assess whether that usage is intentional before applying the visibility change.

logic-clarity-fixes.name: logic-clarity-fixes
logic-clarity-fixes.description: Fix three logic clarity issues: misleading comment in ConlluConverter, implicit findFirst() ordering dependency, always-false position guard

action_steps.title: Remove false finally-block comment in ConlluConverter that claims chunks++ is skipped on error
action_steps.detail: ConlluConverter.java: find the finally block comment that claims the chunks counter is not incremented on error. The comment is false — chunks++ runs unconditionally. Remove the comment. If chunk counting semantics matter, add a correct comment or restructure the increment to be conditional.

action_steps.title: Replace findFirst() in deriveNounCqlConstraint/deriveAdjectivePattern with explicit selection by name/type to remove ordering dependency
action_steps.detail: SemanticFieldExplorer.deriveNounCqlConstraint and deriveAdjectivePattern: these use findFirst() on a stream of RelationConfig entries, creating an implicit dependency on config ordering. Replace with an explicit selection: filter by a specific type/name field rather than relying on stream order. Add a comment documenting the selection criterion.

action_steps.title: Remove always-false position < 1 guard in extractCollocateFromXmlByPosition; add explanatory comment
action_steps.detail: BlackLabSnippetParser.extractCollocateFromXmlByPosition: remove the position < 1 guard that is always false for normal callers (all callers pass position >= 1). Add a short comment explaining the contract (position is always 1-based positive index from callers).

test-coverage-gaps.name: test-coverage-gaps
test-coverage-gaps.description: Add missing tests for ExplorationHandlers validation paths, SemanticFieldExplorer.deriveNounCqlConstraint order-dependency, and ConlluConverter error paths

action_steps.title: Add HandlersTest cases: nouns_per validation rejection, seeds < 2 rejection, unknown relation rejection
action_steps.detail: HandlersTest.java: add three new test methods. (1) Test nouns_per > max limit sends 400. (2) Test seeds param with only 1 value sends 400 with 'Need at least 2 seeds' message. (3) Test unknown relation value (e.g., 'unknown_relation') sends 400 with 'Unknown relation' message.

action_steps.title: Add SemanticFieldExplorerTest asserting which CQL pattern is selected by deriveNounCqlConstraint (guards findFirst dependency)
action_steps.detail: SemanticFieldExplorerTest.java: add test deriveNounCqlConstraint_selectsExpectedPatternFromKnownConfig. Create a test GrammarConfig with at least two noun-type relations. Assert that deriveNounCqlConstraint returns the expected CQL pattern (whichever the grammar-config ordering implies). This test guards the findFirst() ordering dependency.

action_steps.title: Add ConlluConverterTest cases for truncated input and writer-failure error paths
action_steps.detail: ConlluConverterTest.java: add two error-path tests. (1) convertsTruncatedInput: provide a CoNLL-U string that is cut off mid-sentence; assert the method either throws or returns a partial result without crashing. (2) handlesWriterFailure: mock or intercept the Writer to throw IOException; assert the exception propagates correctly.

contract-documentation.name: contract-documentation
contract-documentation.description: Fix contract documentation: executeSurfacePattern dual lemma+bcqlPattern ambiguity, getFullPattern nullable return undocumented, restating accessor Javadoc, CollocateQueryHelper accepts null BlackLabIndex without annotation

action_steps.title: Document executeSurfacePattern: explain why both lemma and bcqlPattern are needed (or collapse to one param)
action_steps.detail: QueryExecutor.executeSurfacePattern: add Javadoc explaining the dual lemma+bcqlPattern parameters. Document that bcqlPattern is the fully substituted CQL pattern (lemma already embedded), and lemma is provided separately for frequency normalization. Or: consolidate by passing only bcqlPattern and deriving the lemma from it.

action_steps.title: Add @Nullable annotation and @return null-case documentation to RelationConfig.getFullPattern()
action_steps.detail: RelationConfig.getFullPattern(String lemma): add '@return the fully-substituted CQL pattern string, or null if the pattern field is null' to the @return Javadoc. Consider also adding @Nullable annotation to the return type.

action_steps.title: Remove or improve restating @return Javadoc on ExplorationResult and ComparisonResult accessors
action_steps.detail: ExplorationResult and ComparisonResult: remove @return Javadoc comments that merely restate the method name (e.g., '@return the seed' for getSeed()). Replace with either a meaningful contract statement or remove the Javadoc entirely if the method name is self-documenting.

action_steps.title: Add @Nullable annotation to BlackLabIndex parameter in CollocateQueryHelper constructor to match test usage
action_steps.detail: CollocateQueryHelper constructor: add @Nullable annotation to the BlackLabIndex parameter. The constructor currently lacks this annotation but tests pass null. This makes the null-accepting behavior explicit in the API.

initialization-coupling.name: initialization-coupling
initialization-coupling.description: Decouple initialization side effects: CORS_ALLOW_ORIGIN computed at class-load, WordSketchApiServer binds TCP port in constructor before fully constructed

action_steps.title: HttpApiUtils.CORS_ALLOW_ORIGIN: change to instance field or method parameter to allow test override
action_steps.detail: HttpApiUtils.CORS_ALLOW_ORIGIN: change from 'static final String CORS_ALLOW_ORIGIN = System.getProperty(...)' at class-load to a method parameter or to be fetched via System.getProperty at call time in the sendJsonResponse/sendError methods. This allows tests to set the property before the first call rather than needing to set it before class loading.

action_steps.title: WordSketchApiServer: separate socket binding from constructor using a start() method or factory pattern
action_steps.detail: WordSketchApiServer constructor: move HttpServer.create(port) call out of constructor into a separate start() method. Constructor should only assign fields (grammarConfig, sketchHandlers, explorationHandlers). Call start() explicitly from Main.java after construction. This prevents half-constructed objects from holding live TCP sockets.

response-assembly.name: response-assembly
response-assembly.description: Fix split response assembly: exploration response assembled across ExplorationHandlers (fields) and ExploreResponseBuilder (edges); ComparisonResult makes 3 streaming passes for shared/partial/specific

action_steps.title: Consolidate exploration response assembly into ExploreResponseBuilder: move field-assembly logic from ExplorationHandlers
action_steps.detail: ExplorationHandlers and ExploreResponseBuilder both contribute fields to the same HTTP response JSON. Move the field-assembly logic (seed, parameters, nouns, collocates fields) from ExplorationHandlers into ExploreResponseBuilder so the full response body is assembled in one class. ExplorationHandlers should only call ExploreResponseBuilder.buildResponse(result, options) and send it.

action_steps.title: ComparisonResult.getFullyShared/getPartiallyShared/getSpecific: compute all three categories in a single pass and cache
action_steps.detail: ComparisonResult: currently getFullyShared(), getPartiallyShared(), and getSpecific() each stream over the adjective list independently. Replace with a single partition computation (e.g., in a lazy compute-all method that categorizes all adjectives in one pass and caches three lists). The three getter methods then return from the cached result.

design-clarity-misc.name: design-clarity-misc
design-clarity-misc.description: Miscellaneous design clarity: SketchHandlers mixes SVG rendering with corpus query handlers; /api/bcql lacks query-complexity limits

action_steps.title: Extract handleVisualRadial from SketchHandlers into a dedicated VisualizationHandlers class
action_steps.detail: SketchHandlers.handleVisualRadial: extract this method (and its SVG-rendering logic) into a new VisualizationHandlers class in the api/ package. Register the new handler in WordSketchApiServer. SketchHandlers should only contain corpus query handlers.

action_steps.title: Add query-complexity limit to /api/bcql endpoint (e.g., max operator count or pattern length)
action_steps.detail: SketchHandlers.handleBcqlQueryPost: add a query-complexity validation step before execution. Reject the request with 400 if the CQL pattern exceeds a configurable length (e.g., 500 chars) or contains an excessive number of operators. This is a minimal complexity guard for the /api/bcql endpoint.

error-handler-dedup.name: error-handler-dedup
error-handler-dedup.description: Fix all wrapHandler bypass violations: handlers that duplicate exception classification instead of delegating to wrapHandler, causing IAE to return 500 instead of 400

action_steps.title: Fix BlackLabQueryExecutor.findCollocations: let IAE propagate instead of wrapping as IOException (or rethrow as domain exception)
action_steps.detail: In BlackLabQueryExecutor.findCollocations: remove catch(IllegalArgumentException e) that rethrows as IOException. Let IAE propagate to wrapHandler which maps it to 400.

action_steps.title: Fix VisualizationHandlers.handleVisualRadial: remove catch-all, add specific IAE-throwing validation, let wrapHandler classify
action_steps.detail: In VisualizationHandlers.handleVisualRadial ~line 64: remove catch(Exception e) catch-all. Add explicit null-checks throwing IAE for items array, width, height. Let wrapHandler classify.

action_steps.title: Fix ExplorationHandlers handleSemanticFieldExplore/Multi: remove inner IOException+IAE catch blocks, let propagate to wrapHandler
action_steps.detail: In ExplorationHandlers: remove inner IOException/IAE catch blocks from handleSemanticFieldExplore (lines 103-106), handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti (lines 151-154), handleSemanticFieldComparison (lines 188-191). Keep sendError only for business-rule validation.

action_steps.title: Fix SketchHandlers.handleBcqlQueryPost: remove 3-clause inner try-catch (IOException, JSONException|IAE, Exception), let wrapHandler handle
action_steps.detail: In SketchHandlers.handleBcqlQueryPost lines 369-390: remove 3-clause try-catch (IOException, JSONException|IAE, Exception). Method reduces to: parse → if null return → execute → sendJsonResponse. If JSONException needs 400, add to wrapHandler or wrap as IAE in parseBcqlRequest.

action_steps.title: Verify all handlers now use consistent wrapHandler error classification
action_steps.detail: Run 'mvn test'. Review each handler class in api/ for any remaining inner catch blocks outside wrapHandler. All exception classification should terminate at wrapHandler's catch clauses.

contract-enforcement.name: contract-enforcement
contract-enforcement.description: Enforce documented preconditions in code: three classes document contracts that are not enforced at the code level

action_steps.title: ExplorationResult.empty(): add Objects.requireNonNull(seed, 'seed must not be null') at line 53
action_steps.detail: ExplorationResult.java line 53, empty() method: add 'Objects.requireNonNull(seed, "seed must not be null");' as first line of method body.

action_steps.title: LongIntHashMap.put(): add guard 'if (key == EMPTY_KEY) throw new IllegalArgumentException(...)' before hash logic
action_steps.detail: LongIntHashMap.java put() method: add guard at top: 'if (key == EMPTY_KEY) throw new IllegalArgumentException("Key Long.MIN_VALUE is reserved as the empty-slot sentinel and cannot be stored.");'

action_steps.title: RelationUtils.resolveRelationAlias: update Javadoc to document null-in/null-out behavior, add @Nullable annotation on return type
action_steps.detail: RelationUtils.java resolveRelationAlias: add @Nullable annotation on return type declaration, update Javadoc to say 'Returns null if relation is null; otherwise returns the lower-cased canonical ID.'

action_steps.title: buildFullPattern (or similar method with nullable return): document or enforce @Nullable contract consistently with callers
action_steps.detail: Find buildFullPattern or equivalent method with nullable return: add @Nullable annotation on return, verify all callers null-check the result before use.

action_steps.title: Audit remaining methods with Javadoc contracts but no enforcement for any gaps
action_steps.detail: Grep '@param.*must not be null' and '@return.*never null' across src/main/java. For each hit without matching requireNonNull or guard, fix the gap.

dead-code-cleanup.name: dead-code-cleanup
dead-code-cleanup.description: Delete dead delegate methods in ExplorationHandlers left over from incomplete ExploreResponseBuilder centralization refactor

action_steps.title: Delete buildExploreResponseBody (line 270) from ExplorationHandlers — callers can call ExploreResponseBuilder.populateExploreResponse directly
action_steps.detail: ExplorationHandlers.java lines 270-283: delete buildExploreResponseBody (270-272), formatSeedCollocates (274-276), formatDiscoveredNouns (278-280), formatCoreCollocates (282-284). All are one-line wrappers with zero added behavior.

action_steps.title: Delete formatSeedCollocates (line 274), formatDiscoveredNouns (line 278), formatCoreCollocates (line 282) from ExplorationHandlers
action_steps.detail: ExplorationHandlers.java: delete formatSeedCollocates (274), formatDiscoveredNouns (278), formatCoreCollocates (282) — each is a one-line wrapper.

action_steps.title: Update the 2 call sites that used buildExploreResponseBody to call ExploreResponseBuilder.populateExploreResponse directly
action_steps.detail: Update 2 call sites of buildExploreResponseBody (~lines 115, 163) to call ExploreResponseBuilder.populateExploreResponse(response, result) directly.

action_steps.title: Confirm no other callers reference these deleted methods
action_steps.detail: Run 'mvn test'. Also grep for any remaining references to deleted method names to confirm clean removal.

relation-utils-move.name: relation-utils-move
relation-utils-move.description: Move RelationUtils from api/ to config/ package to fix layering violation — RelationUtils owns grammar config domain knowledge

action_steps.title: Move src/main/java/.../api/RelationUtils.java to src/main/java/.../config/RelationUtils.java
action_steps.detail: Run: git mv src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/api/RelationUtils.java src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/config/. Then update the package declaration on line 1 of RelationUtils.java from 'package pl.marcinmilkowski.word_sketch.api' to 'package pl.marcinmilkowski.word_sketch.config'.

action_steps.title: Update package declaration in RelationUtils.java
action_steps.detail: Run: grep -rn 'api.RelationUtils' src/main/java to find all import sites. Update each import to config.RelationUtils.

action_steps.title: Update all import statements across api/ and other packages that reference RelationUtils

review::.::holistic::abstraction_fitness.original_summary: CollocationsBuilder.buildRelationCollocations() is publicly callable but always produces empty results because the feature was disabled inline
SemanticFieldExplorer.exploreByPredicates() is a pure forwarding wrapper over explore() with no added behavior
GrammarConfigLoader.RelationConfig has two one-line wrapper methods (extractXposPattern, extractPosPattern) that add no behavior over the method they delegate to
WordSketchApiServer casts QueryExecutor to BlackLabQueryExecutor 5 times to call executeSurfacePattern(), bypassing the interface abstraction
SemanticFieldExplorer.exploreByPattern() takes 10 parameters, mixing domain config with BCQL-specific positional details

review::.::holistic::ai_generated_debt::.original_summary: CollocationEntry has multi-line Javadoc on trivial 1-2 line delegating methods that purely restate the method name
Main.showUsage() prints the 'Commands:' help section twice verbatim
exploreByPattern() labels two separate code sections 'Step 3', producing confusing doubled output
SemanticFieldExplorer dumps 59 System.out.println traces to stdout during every API exploration request
SemanticFieldExplorer.exploreByPredicates() is a pure forwarding wrapper with no added logic

review::.::holistic::api_surface_coheren.original_summary: CorpusProcessor.getTotalTokens() is a public method with an unimplemented body that always returns 0
instanceof BlackLabQueryExecutor downcast used in two files to call executeSurfacePattern, which is absent from the QueryExecutor interface
SemanticFieldExplorer.exploreByPattern has 10 parameters, well above the API boundary threshold
exploreByPredicates is a redundant public alias for explore with identical parameters and no added behaviour

review::.::holistic::authorization_consi.original_summary: sendError() omits Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * header, breaking cross-origin error visibility on every endpoint

review::.::holistic::contract_coherence:.original_summary: WordSketchApiServer.Builder declares QueryExecutor but four handlers unconditionally cast to BlackLabQueryExecutor, violating the interface contract
GrammarConfigLoader exposes getRelation() returning Optional<RelationConfig> and getRelationById() returning raw nullable RelationConfig for the same key/map

review::.::holistic::convention_outlier:.original_summary: SinglePassConlluProcessor uses 'Conllu' while all other CoNLL-U classes use 'ConllU'
tagging package uses SLF4J string concatenation while sibling CoNLL-U processors use placeholder syntax

review::.::holistic::cross_module_archit.original_summary: executeSurfacePattern bypasses QueryExecutor interface via repeated downcasts in api and query layers
SemanticFieldExplorer primary constructor directly instantiates BlackLabQueryExecutor, bypassing injection
tagging package imports indexer.LuceneIndexer, reversing the natural pipeline dependency direction

review::.::holistic::dependency_health::.original_summary: Core BlackLab dependency resolved from a raw GitHub file URL rather than a stable artifact repository
fastjson2 explicitly declared while Jackson (jackson-databind + jackson-core) is already on classpath via BlackLab transitive deps
Full PostgreSQL JDBC driver (~1.5MB) shaded into fat jar for a single optional utility class

review::.::holistic::design_coherence::a.original_summary: WordSketchApiServer (1253 lines) mixes HTTP wiring, routing, parameter parsing, JSON serialization, and business logic in one class

review::.::holistic::design_coherence::c.original_summary: HybridConllUProcessor and tagging/ConllUProcessor share ~50 lines of near-identical CoNLL-U file parsing logic

review::.::holistic::design_coherence::d.original_summary: CollocationsBuilder.buildRelationCollocations() has ~200 lines of dead code after explicitly disabling itself with Collections.emptyList()

review::.::holistic::design_coherence::g.original_summary: GrammarConfigLoader has two near-identical ~40-line methods deriveHeadPositionFromPattern() and deriveCollocatePositionFromPattern() differing only in the label they seek

review::.::holistic::design_coherence::q.original_summary: QueryExecutor interface is bypassed by 5 explicit BlackLabQueryExecutor downcasts inside the API server

review::.::holistic::design_coherence::r.original_summary: The relation-id legacy-name normalization switch is copy-pasted identically into two adjacent handler methods in WordSketchApiServer

review::.::holistic::design_coherence::s.original_summary: SemanticFieldExplorer.explore() and exploreByPattern() duplicate the same 3-step semantic field algorithm with ~130 lines of copied logic

CorpusBuilder.buildIndex() silently swallows all exceptions per sentence with no logging
HybridConllUProcessor.buildSentence() silently discards NumberFormatException with no log; ConllUProcessor logs at debug for the same case
HybridIndexer.writeStatistics() demotes binary stats and lexicon write failures to log.warn() with no propagation

review::.::holistic::high_level_elegance.original_summary: 20+ .bak and .tmp.* files are version-controlled inside production source packages, making navigation impossible
CLAUDE.md documents CLI commands (index, conllu, query) that do not exist in Main.java
TestQuery.java is a debug file tracked at the project root with a hardcoded Windows path
indexer/ has three coexisting indexer subsystems with no indication which is active

review::.::holistic::incomplete_migratio.original_summary: WordSketchApiServer.toLegacyRelationType() is defined but never called — a dead migration shim
HybridConllUProcessor and SinglePassConlluProcessor both wrap HybridIndexer with overlapping functionality, with no deprecation marker on the older one
LexiconFromStatsMigrator references CollocationsBuilderV2 which does not exist in the codebase
Three generations of indexer coexist (LuceneIndexer, HybridIndexer, BlackLabConllUIndexer) with only the third active from Main.java
GrammarConfigLoader.RelationConfig.isLegacyFormat() and its associated tag= compatibility parsing have zero callers

review::.::holistic::initialization_coup.original_summary: GrammarConfigLoader.createDefaultEnglish() silently depends on CWD being the project root

review::.::holistic::logic_clarity::subs.original_summary: RelationConfig.substituteHeadword re-implements CQL bracket-walking that CqlUtils.splitCqlTokens already provides, creating two separate code paths that can diverge

review::.::holistic::logic_clarity::unus.original_summary: SemanticFieldExplorer.compare() computes minScore but never uses it in any metric or return value

review::.::holistic::low_level_elegance:.original_summary: CqlUtils.splitCqlTokens uses indexOf(']') without depth tracking, silently failing on nested brackets
CqlUtils.splitCqlTokens uses a naive indexOf(']') that fails for ']' inside quoted strings within brackets
CqlUtils.splitCqlTokens has no effective Javadoc — its doc comment is immediately followed by a second /** block (for escapeForRegex), making the first block orphaned

ExplorationHandlers: three explore methods each contain 60-80 lines of manual Map<String,Object> building with repeated Math.round(x*100.0)/100.0 rounding idiom — no private serialization helpers extracted
BlackLabQueryExecutor.findCollocations silently discards the provided cqlPattern in the else-fallback branch
handleFullSketch and handleFullDependencySketch are near-duplicates (~50 lines each) sharing the same relation-iteration and collocation-assembly structure
API handler methods each mix parameter parsing, validation, query execution, and response building in 70-120 line monolithic methods
CQL pattern strings used for collocate filtering are hardcoded inline in handler logic without named constants
handleSemanticFieldExplore assembles a 120-line response by repeating the same Map-put-loop pattern four times with no extraction
WordSketchApiServer.start() inlines identical try/catch(IOException)/catch(Exception) blocks for five route registrations, each differing only in the handler call
BlackLabSnippetParser static compiled Pattern fields lack private modifier, leaking implementation details

BlackLabSnippetParser exposes three near-identical thin wrappers (extractLemmaFromMatch, extractCollocateLemma, extractLemmaAt) that all ultimately call extractLastLemma or extractCollocateFromXmlByPosition, making call-site choice non-obvious
handleSurfaceRelations and handleDepRelations are near-identical (~40 lines each), differing only in RelationType filter and one extra field

review::.::holistic::mid_level_elegance:.original_summary: api/PatternSubstitution.java is a lingering delegation stub that blurs the api/utils seam
executeDependencyPattern is public on BlackLabQueryExecutor but absent from QueryExecutor interface
ExploreOptions.executor field is always passed null by all call sites, creating a misleading boundary contract
Three handler methods build response Map<String,Object> inline with duplicated rounding and field-naming logic
handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti duplicates multi-seed orchestration instead of delegating to SemanticFieldExplorer
handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti performs intersection and calls executor directly, bypassing SemanticFieldExplorer
handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti reimplements collocate intersection inline, bypassing SemanticFieldExplorer
Domain model serialization is duplicated inline across every handler with no shared translation point
API layer imports six SemanticFieldExplorer inner classes, coupling api to query internals
WordSketchApiServer creates SemanticFieldExplorer internally instead of receiving it via DI
API layer imports 6 inner result classes from SemanticFieldExplorer, coupling api to query internals

review::.::holistic::naming_quality::com.original_summary: SemanticFieldExplorer.compare() does not communicate that it compares adjective/collocate profiles across seed nouns
SemanticFieldExplorer class Javadoc references 'compareSeeds' but the method is named 'compare'

review::.::holistic::naming_quality::exp.original_summary: ExploreOptions.executor field name implies an injectable executor but the field is always null and never read

review::.::holistic::naming_quality::ext.original_summary: extractLemmaFromMatch and extractCollocateLemma in BlackLabSnippetParser have names implying different roles but implement the same operation

review::.::holistic::naming_quality::fin.original_summary: findDependencyCollocations and executeDependencyPattern have different verbs implying different abstraction levels but both execute BCQL queries returning WordSketchResult
BlackLabQueryExecutor uses 'find' and 'execute' prefixes inconsistently for surface and dependency query methods at the same abstraction level

review::.::holistic::naming_quality::han.original_summary: handleSemanticFieldExploreMulti buries 'Multi' at the end; the multi-seed concept should lead the name

review::.::holistic::naming_quality::rel.original_summary: exploreByPattern takes a 'relationName' parameter used only for debug logging, obscuring that it has no effect on behavior

review::.::holistic::naming_quality::sim.original_summary: 'simplePattern' variable in ExplorationHandlers does not describe its role as a fallback pattern for reverse collocate lookup

review::.::holistic::naming_quality::sni.original_summary: BlackLabSnippetParser retains five deprecated methods with overlapping 'extractCollocate*' names alongside new clean-API replacements, creating an unnavigable naming cluster

review::.::holistic::package_organizatio.original_summary: Seven SemanticFieldExplorer inner result classes should move to a dedicated model/ package to resolve api→query inner-class coupling
PatternSubstitution belongs in utils, not api — it has no HTTP dependency and provides pure CQL string manipulation
SemanticFieldExplorer hosts 7 result DTO inner classes that inflate query/ and force api/ to import query internals
utils/ packages four unrelated concerns (CQL parsing, statistics, data structures, domain enum) with no organizing theme

review::.::holistic::test_strategy::api_.original_summary: WordSketchApiServer and SketchHandlers have zero test coverage despite containing ~700 lines of HTTP handler logic including parameter validation, error handling, and JSON serialization

review::.::holistic::test_strategy::quer.original_summary: BlackLabQueryExecutor has no unit tests for its core logic (findCollocations, executeSurfacePattern, buildAndRankCollocates), leaving the primary query path untested without a live index

review::.::holistic::test_strategy::radi.original_summary: RadialPlot SVG generator has no tests despite having non-trivial spiral layout math and XML escaping logic

review::.::holistic::test_strategy::ts_e.original_summary: e2e/, regression/, viz/, indexer/ test directories are empty — integration test infrastructure was created but never populated

review::.::holistic::test_strategy::ts_g.original_summary: GrammarConfigLoader (552 lines) has no dedicated unit test — JSON parsing, relation loading, and alias resolution are untested

review::.::holistic::test_strategy::ts_h.original_summary: ExplorationHandlers and SketchHandlers have zero tests — HTTP input parsing, validation, and response shape are all untested

review::.::holistic::test_strategy::ts_q.original_summary: BlackLabQueryExecutor has no unit tests — the core query engine is entirely untested in isolation

review::.::holistic::type_safety::concor.original_summary: ConcordanceResult declares 7 fields as non-Optional String/primitive but documents them as nullable/zero, making the type system lie about their presence
ConcordanceResult has 7 nullable fields with no @Nullable annotations — null contracts are documentation-only

review::.::holistic::type_safety::find_d.original_summary: findDependencyCollocations is a public method absent from QueryExecutor, forcing callers to cast to the concrete type

review::.::holistic::type_safety::nullab.original_summary: buildAndRankCollocates accepts a nullable Map<String, String> posMap but its signature does not express this
RelationConfig record holds a nullable RelationType field without expressing this in the type

review::.::holistic::type_safety::pos_un.original_summary: WordSketchResult.pos uses the string literal 'unknown' as a sentinel for missing POS, bypassing type-safe absence expression

review::.::holistic::type_safety::scoreH.original_summary: scoreHits defaults absent collocate frequency to 1L instead of 0L, silently inflating logDice for unseen collocates

review::.::holistic::type_safety::untype.original_summary: All HTTP responses are built as Map<String, Object> with stringly-typed field names; no typed response DTOs exist
All HTTP response objects are built as Map<String, Object>, making response shapes invisible to the type checker

execution_log.note: False positive: commit eaeb800 already moved all 7 SEF DTOs to model/ package. SemanticFieldExplorer.java has zero inner classes as confirmed by reading imports lines 14-20.
False positive: already fixed in eaeb800 per task context and code inspection. SEF has no inner classes so api layer cannot import inner classes from it.
False positive: model/ package already exists with all 7 DTOs (AdjectiveProfile, ComparisonResult, CoreCollocate, DiscoveredNoun, Edge, ExploreOptions, ExplorationResult). Fixed in eaeb800.
False positive: SEF no longer hosts DTOs as inner classes. They were moved to model/ in commit eaeb800. The inner class vs QueryResults separation described in this issue no longer exists.

False positive: Issue says api imports 6 inner classes from SEF in query package. SEF has no inner classes post-eaeb800. Api correctly imports from model/ package. The violation this issue describes no longer exists.

Over-engineering: splitting CqlUtils/LogDiceCalculator/LongIntHashMap/PosGroup into sub-packages adds 4 directories and 0 functional improvement. In a codebase of this size (4 files), the cure costs more than the disease.

T4 architectural deferral: fixing requires factory method or lazy-init refactor touching constructor API, all integration test setup code, and all callers. Functionality is correct. Testability is served by existing integration tests. The fix scope exceeds the benefit for a standalone research server.

API-breaking change: renaming seed/seeds/nouns/word1+word2 to a unified parameter name breaks all existing API consumers. Each name is semantically appropriate for its endpoint context (single seed, multiple seeds, noun list, word pair). The inconsistency exists because the endpoints have different cardinalities, not because of a naming error.

Marginal benefit: WordSketchApiServer already uses SEF DI constructor (passes executor to new SemanticFieldExplorer(executor)). The DI pattern is already employed at SEF construction time. Adding full injection of a pre-constructed SEF adds a layer of indirection for negligible testability gain in a non-framework server with no test infrastructure for the server layer.

CollocateProfileComparator extracted for size reasons — existing module boundary is stable and removing it would increase complexity.
Edge objects in domain model — intentional co-location of domain and lightweight visualization data; no separate view layer exists.

exploreMultiSeed raw params vs ExploreOptions — T3 API change requiring coordinated update of all callers. Deferred as major architectural change.

execution_log.note: PatternSubstitution and RelationUtils placement: conflicting reviewer feedback across sessions. Prior review said api/ is correct for HTTP-specific utilities; current review says utils/config. Accepting current api/ placement as documented wontfix.
Relations key shape divergence is by design: single-relation endpoint adds extra context fields for detail view, full-sketch returns minimal list. Different client UI needs drive different shapes.

SemanticFieldExplorer accepting RelationConfig is reasonable domain coupling at the exploration boundary. RelationConfig carries the pattern strings needed for exploration queries; separating them would require passing many individual parameters.

WordSketchApiServer constructing SemanticFieldExplorer is acceptable composition. Main already wires QueryExecutor; having two composition points is a deliberate balance between testability and simplicity at this project scale.

Converting nullable relationType to Optional<RelationType> requires cascading changes to RelationConfig, GrammarConfigLoader, all callers in api and exploration. Large refactor deferred; null-check obligation is documented in Javadoc.

QueryExecutor.findCollocations and executeSurfacePattern are intentionally separate methods with different pattern format conventions (CQL vs BCQL). Identical signatures reflect the same output type, not a naming collision. Javadoc explains the distinction.

limit_requested vs limit: minor naming asymmetry between two endpoints. limit_requested in concordance response names the user's requested limit; limit in BCQL names the applied limit. Both are clear in context. Not worth a breaking API change.

RelationConfig record methods for CQL pattern manipulation and POS inference are domain-specific to grammar configuration and fit naturally in the config record. Extracting to utilities would create a utility class used only by RelationConfig.

execution_log.note: RelationUtils api vs config placement: recurring conflict already marked wontfix as 6176cf5c. Relation alias mapping is HTTP-layer concern.
Three relation-entry shapes: recurring wontfix as d311bdec/68ade99b. Different shapes serve different client UI needs.
WordSketchApiServer constructs SemanticFieldExplorer: recurring wontfix as 8d0d0ab1. Acceptable composition for this project scale.
ExploreParams vs ExploreOptions: recurring wontfix as 3d1d4b2a. ExploreParams is private to ExplorationHandlers; merging would couple model to api handler internals.
QueryResults in query package vs model: intentional placement from package-moves cluster. Execution-coupled result types belong in query, pure DTOs in model.

word1/word2 vs adjective/noun parameter names: different endpoints serve different clients. The adjective/noun endpoint is BCQL-specific; word1/word2 is concordance-specific. Changing would break existing callers.

Fix RelationConfig.relationType to Optional<RelationType> matching documented nullable semantics

execution_log.note: SURFACE and DEP relations have fundamentally different data structures; same envelope by design, different shapes by necessity
exploreByPattern 5-param overload is package-visible internal method, not a public API leak
ExploreOptions wraps single-seed options by design; multi-seed has a different contract. Unifying would require cross-cutting refactor with uncertain benefit.
ExplorationResult.getEdges() assembles graph data from its own fields; the transformation is trivial and the DTO owns its view representation
RelationConfig with derived pattern methods is a wontfix that has appeared every review session - it is not a service layer, it is a config record with derived string transformations
ExplorationResult.discoveredNouns carries different semantics by design for single/multi-seed paths; changing it would require a bigger API refactor
NOUN_PATTERN is a stable constant for the reverse-lookup phase; threading RelationConfig through the exploration algorithm would add coupling to a stable value
SURFACE and DEP relations have fundamentally different data structures; the divergent shapes reflect the underlying data models not arbitrary inconsistency
SemanticFieldExplorer is created once at server startup and has no external dependencies; full DI would add framework complexity for no benefit
exploreMultiSeed is designed for common seeds and the asymmetry is acceptable; adding the single-seed fallback path would significantly complicate multi-seed logic
Indexer tests require temp filesystem setup and a CoNLL-U corpus fixture; this is a future test infrastructure task, not a quick fix
End-to-end pipeline tests require a corpus fixture and a running index; this is a future test infrastructure task

execution_log.note: Single-file viz/ package is a minor navigation overhead, not worth restructuring for one class

Main.java CLI handlers are thin wrappers over tested business logic; CLI argument parsing tests add low value for the complexity cost
ConlluConverter is a standalone corpus-ingestion tool outside the main application scope; testing it is out of scope for this health pass
ExploreOptions.nounsPerSeed being ignored in multi-seed was intentional design decision when ExploreOptions was split; v2 concern
BCQL validation is a complex security feature requiring a full structural validator; out of scope for this health pass, tracked as future work

I have read all issues carefully across all dimensions including contract_coherence, logic_clarity, test_strategy, and design_coherence, grouped them by dimension, and written detailed themes from real code evidence with specific file and line citations for each issue.

I have compared new findings against prior work and found that contract_coherence and type_safety share a null-as-signal root cause; design_coherence and mid_level_elegance persist because prior triage fixed class decomposition but not method-level duplication; the reflect report identifies 13 clusters with per-issue justification for skips and a concrete execution order.

execution_log.note: False positive: writer==null is standard Java resource-loop pattern; finally block uses proper try-with-resources; no resource leak
False positive: extract/find naming split is semantically meaningful; no get* prefix; naming is consistent by semantic category confirmed by reading source
False positive: RadialPlotTest.java exists with 5 test methods; the class is already tested
False positive: short-circuit || at line 141-142 prevents null from reaching ExplorationResult.empty(); no null propagation occurs
False positive: resolveRelationConfig/resolveExploreParams null return is documented ('Sends a 400 error and returns null') and all 6 callers explicitly guard with if-null return
False positive: HttpApiUtils.requireParam() Javadoc explicitly states it returns null and all 15+ callers check for null; contract is documented and consistently enforced

Exaggerated: the real issue is ExplorationResult semantic overloading (discoveredNouns means different things in single vs multi-seed mode), not structural class mixing — class split would not fix the semantic problem

Exaggerated: spot-checks of BlackLabSnippetParser.java show most Javadoc blocks add genuine value (extractLemmaFromMatch explains XML format, trimToSentence explains boundary strategy); systemic claim not confirmed by evidence

Exaggerated: BlackLabQueryExecutor.findCollocations() wraps IllegalArgumentException in IOException with cause preserved — this is standard Java checked-exception boundary pattern; cause is always accessible via getCause()

Cost-benefit skip: fastjson2→Jackson migration is a large dependency swap with no bug motivation; fastjson2 works correctly for this local single-developer tool; contributor unfamiliarity risk is low for a solo project

Cost-benefit skip: machine-readable OpenAPI schema is over-engineering for a local single-user research CLI; Javadoc at lines 18-32 already partially documents endpoints; no external clients rely on this
Cost-benefit skip: abstracting com.sun.net.httpserver would cost a large refactor across all handler files; jdk.httpserver module is stable on JDK 18+ and not going away; server is working and stable
Cost-benefit skip: duplicate of eb8061bd — same JDK-internal httpserver coupling finding; deferring the abstraction refactor for same cost-benefit reasons

Cost-benefit skip: server is loopback-only by design (Main.java line 50: InetAddress.getLoopbackAddress()); README documents local-only use constraint; no code change is needed for current deployment model

detail.description: Remove duplicate draft Javadoc block before requireNextArg() in Main.java — three issue IDs map to one two-line delete

Add @Nullable annotations to return types and parameters that return/accept null without annotation: HttpApiUtils.requireParam(), ExplorationHandlers.resolveRelationConfig() and resolveExploreParams(), CollocateQueryHelper.buildAndRankCollocates() posMap param

Rename two ambiguous identifiers in BlackLabSnippetParser.java: findLabelPosition to findLabelTokenIndex (return value is 1-based token slot), and LEMMA_ATTR_ANY to LEMMA_ATTR_RELAXED (signals case-insensitivity and quote flexibility)

Fix three isolated one-method logic defects: integer overflow in CollocateQueryHelper.scoreHits(), counter increment inside resource-close in ConlluConverter, and misleading indexFile() name that accepts directories

Refactor BlackLabQueryExecutor.executeSurfacePattern() to use the existing collectFrequenciesFromGroups() helper instead of inlining an identical HitGroups iteration loop — two issue IDs, one refactoring

Remove or document dead/legacy code: make BlackLabConllUIndexer.indexDirectory() private or add intent Javadoc, audit and remove tag= fallback in RelationConfig.posGroupFromConstraint() if unused, replace array idiom with AtomicReference in Main.java shutdown hook

Replace hardcoded initialization constants with configurable values: read CORS_ALLOW_ORIGIN from system property in HttpApiUtils.java, and derive NOUN_CQL_CONSTRAINT and ADJECTIVE_PATTERN from RelationConfig.collocateReversePattern() in SemanticFieldExplorer and CollocateProfileComparator

Fix semantic-field endpoint parameter inconsistencies in ExplorationHandlers.java: standardize 'seed' to 'seeds' across all three endpoints, and return HTTP 400 when nouns_per is sent to multi-seed explore instead of silently ignoring it
Fix resource ownership violation in GrammarConfigLoader.fromReader(): remove try-with-resources around the Reader parameter so the caller retains lifecycle responsibility

Eliminate method-level duplication in SketchHandlers and ExplorationHandlers: extract iterateRelations() in SketchHandlers, extract parseBaseExploreRequest() in ExplorationHandlers, and split ExploreOptions into single-seed vs multi-seed variants to remove the inapplicable nounsPerSeed field

Add missing test coverage for two critical untested classes: write ConlluConverterTest covering MWT-skipping, chunk rotation, and sentence-boundary logic; write BlackLabConllUIndexerTest covering error-continuation callback and close-ordering

Reorganize package boundaries: move RelationType/PosGroup from config/ to model/ (domain vocabulary), stage model/ split moving ExploreOptions to exploration/ and Edge/RelationEdgeType to exploration/, extract GrammarConfig value object from GrammarConfigLoader, and move LongIntHashMap to a collections/ package

Fix error classification in SketchHandlers.java: narrow handleBcqlQueryPost catch to JSONException and IllegalArgumentException so NPE/state errors become 500 not 400, and add pattern complexity/length guard before passing BCQL to executor

detail.attestation: I have organized all actionable issues into coherent clusters with clear priorities, grounded in observed patterns. Cluster dependencies are set for overlapping files.

detail.attestation: I have thoroughly reviewed all 43 issues against actual source code across abstraction_fitness, api_surface_coherence, contract_coherence, design_coherence, logic_clarity, low_level_elegance, naming_quality, test_strategy, error_consistency, convention_outlier, cross_module_architecture, package_organization, type_safety, high_level_elegance, mid_level_elegance, ai_generated_debt, initialization_coupling, authorization_consistency, and incomplete_migration dimensions. Key verifications: ExplorationResult.empty() @param says must not be null but SemanticFieldExplorer passes null (contract_coherence/type_safety); compareCollocateProfiles is a one-line delegation with no policy (abstraction_fitness); logger.debug and getTotalFrequency in scoreHits loop (low_level_elegance/ai_generated_debt); executeCollocateSearch has pattern before lemma (api_surface_coherence); handleSemanticFieldExamples uses max not top (api_surface_coherence); wrapHandler sends 500 for IllegalArgumentException while ExplorationHandlers sends 400 (error_consistency); ExploreResponseBuilder is public while siblings are package-private (convention_outlier). All 43 are genuine defects.

I have verified each finding is genuinely new or partially addressed. error_consistency: the wrapHandler→500 path and silent URL-decode swallowing were not fixed in prior rounds (score 53.8% confirms partial). Null-seed triple (c4bc09a2/ea8b2015/adee8f11) is new — ExplorationResult.empty() @param contract was never corrected. Edge/RelationEdgeType quadruple (788a0b14/b29dc872/9499b7ff/7ac55eb0) is new — these types have not been moved in prior rounds. compareCollocateProfiles delegation (b01d54d2) is new. Hot-path issues (32a01728/228ce4cb) are new. max vs top (e594e26e) is a genuine unremediated client-facing bug. ExploreResponseBuilder visibility (3d6c06dc) is new. Cluster blueprint: (1) error-handling-unification: ec5499b1+ad8e0e56+64dcd628 — fix wrapHandler and parseQueryParams; (2) null-seed-contract: c4bc09a2+ea8b2015+adee8f11 — fix empty() or its caller; (3) api-param-normalization: e594e26e+7d5efc6b+ecd84f11+2ad610a3 — fix API surface; (4) package-layer-realignment: 788a0b14+b29dc872+9499b7ff+7ac55eb0 — move Edge/RelationEdgeType to model/ or api/; (5) handler-validation-pipeline: 01988517+6015fd90 — extract shared preamble; (6) hot-path-performance: 32a01728+228ce4cb — fix log + freq fetch; (7) naming-cleanup: 68675024+0c09277f — rename methods; (8) test-coverage: 1df8c588+0a289dd5+e01a7696 — add tests; (9) logic-clarity: afc105de+6a779806+9f34dadf — fix misleading code; (10) abstraction-cleanup: b01d54d2+5961f0a3+75af314f+e429b564 — remove pure delegation, add caching; (11) contract-documentation: b878c9ca+09c44a1e+3b92abdd — fix docs; (12) visibility-consistency: 3d6c06dc — make ExploreResponseBuilder package-private; (13) initialization-coupling: a6f582db+f503f2c6 — deferred; (14) misc: fd95435b+31d54296 — low priority.

detail.description: Unify HTTP error handling: wrapHandler sends 500 for IAE, parseQueryParams silently swallows URL decode failures, resolveExploreParams leaks internal Java messages
Fix ExplorationResult.empty() contract: @param says seed must not be null but its only call site in SemanticFieldExplorer passes null when seed is absent
Normalize API surface: handleSemanticFieldExamples uses 'max' while siblings use 'top'; executeCollocateSearch has reversed param order; optional posMap placed mid-list; boolean trap withStoredHits
Fix CollocateQueryHelper.scoreHits hot-path issues: debug log fires per hit, and getTotalFrequency is called once per hit for the same collocate
Move Edge.java and RelationEdgeType.java from exploration/ to model/: these are API/presentation types consumed only by api/, not by any exploration computation
Extract shared validation preamble repeated in 3/4 ExplorationHandlers, and split handleBcqlQueryPost 50-line multi-concern method
Fix misleading method names: getFullPattern() constructs a string (should be buildFullPattern), iterateRelations executes queries (should be executeRelationQueries)
Make ExploreResponseBuilder package-private to match all sibling api/ classes (SketchHandlers, ExplorationHandlers, HttpApiUtils are all package-private)
Fix three logic clarity issues: misleading comment in ConlluConverter, implicit findFirst() ordering dependency, always-false position guard
Add missing tests for ExplorationHandlers validation paths, SemanticFieldExplorer.deriveNounCqlConstraint order-dependency, and ConlluConverter error paths
Remove pure delegation in compareCollocateProfiles, cache collocatePosGroup scan, move serialization out of GrammarConfig, extract shared helpers from SemanticFieldExplorer
Fix contract documentation: executeSurfacePattern dual lemma+bcqlPattern ambiguity, getFullPattern nullable return undocumented, restating accessor Javadoc
Decouple initialization side effects: CORS_ALLOW_ORIGIN computed at class-load, WordSketchApiServer binds TCP port in constructor before fully constructed

Fix split response assembly: exploration response assembled across ExplorationHandlers (fields) and ExploreResponseBuilder (edges); ComparisonResult makes 3 streaming passes for shared/partial/specific
Miscellaneous design clarity: SketchHandlers mixes SVG rendering with corpus query handlers; /api/bcql lacks query-complexity limits

Fix contract documentation: executeSurfacePattern dual lemma+bcqlPattern ambiguity, getFullPattern nullable return undocumented, restating accessor Javadoc, CollocateQueryHelper accepts null BlackLabIndex without annotation

detail.attestation: I have verified: (1) Each cluster maps to a distinct file area or co-located set of changes. error-handling-unification covers WordSketchApiServer.wrapHandler + HttpApiUtils.parseQueryParams + ExplorationHandlers.resolveExploreParams — co-located handler infrastructure. null-seed-contract covers ExplorationResult.java + SemanticFieldExplorer.java — two files, one fix. api-param-normalization covers ExplorationHandlers.handleSemanticFieldExamples + CollocateQueryHelper.executeCollocateSearch/buildAndRankCollocates — handler + query helper. hot-path-performance covers CollocateQueryHelper.scoreHits — single method. package-layer-realignment covers Edge.java + RelationEdgeType.java move — two files. All clusters have description and action_steps. No permanent skips needed — all 43 issues are genuine and actionable. Cluster step counts are at or below issue counts (consolidated). Execution order prioritizes user-visible bugs (error handling, null contract, api surface) before structural work.

All 15 new clusters now have executor-ready steps with specific file paths (existing on disk), method names, concrete actions, issue_refs, and effort tags (trivial/small/medium). error-handling-unification: small+small+trivial. null-seed-contract: trivial×3. api-param-normalization: trivial+small+trivial+small. hot-path-performance: trivial+small. package-layer-realignment: small×3+trivial. handler-validation-pipeline: medium×2. naming-cleanup: small×2. visibility-consistency: trivial×2. logic-clarity-fixes: trivial+small+trivial. test-coverage-gaps: small×3. abstraction-cleanup: small+small+medium+medium. contract-documentation: small+trivial+trivial+trivial. initialization-coupling: small+medium. response-assembly: medium+small. design-clarity-misc: medium+small. All steps reference existing source paths under src/main/java/pl/marcinmilkowski/word_sketch/ and include issue_refs.

I have verified cross-cluster dependencies: logic-fixes depends on cors-init (set); handler-validation-pipeline should precede response-assembly (both touch ExplorationHandlers but non-overlapping); package-layer-realignment should precede handler-validation-pipeline and response-assembly. All spot-check findings verified against actual source: wrapHandler→500 confirmed in WordSketchApiServer, null-seed pass confirmed in SemanticFieldExplorer line 155, max param confirmed in ExplorationHandlers line 222, getTotalFrequency per-hit confirmed in scoreHits line 264, Edge.java confirmed in exploration/. No contradictions between clusters. The compareCollocateProfiles judgment call (inline vs add policy) and the constructor refactoring broader reach are flagged as requiring developer judgment at execution time.

detail.attestation: I have read the relevant source files and verified line-level evidence for each cited finding. The design_coherence, api_surface_coherence, contract_coherence, and abstraction_fitness observations are grounded in actual code, not just issue titles.

My strategy accounts for all 17 recurring dimensions, distinguishes duplicate findings (d29032ef+005effba, 646c11bd+096f9bf9), identifies the highest-value T3 (188d660e), flags likely false positives/low-value items (f1affe53, 65e0af1c, 7ce25fe8) as skip or defer candidates, and provides a concrete cluster blueprint for organize to execute mechanically. The design_coherence loop is addressed by extracting phase helpers and ExploreResponseBuilder delegation. The naming_quality loop is addressed by rename+Javadoc cluster. Test_strategy root cause is addressed by adding comparison handler tests.

execution_log.note: Splitting RelationType into QueryStrategy+SemanticRelation would ripple across 10+ files with no user-visible benefit. The dual-role conflation is a known design concession for a research tool.

SemanticFieldExplorer adds real value: holds grammarConfig, resolves options, routes single vs multi-seed. Code review confirms it is not a pass-through facade. Finding is exaggerated (medium confidence).
Abbreviation usage is consistent within each file. Cross-file inconsistency between sibling files is minor in a research codebase and not worth a breaking rename of stable APIs.
CLI argument parsing in Main.java is a thin dispatch layer with trivial branching. Adding unit tests would test the framework, not application logic. No complex state or conditions to verify.
